description: User selects March 1st as the departure date in the calendar
frame_description: The user hovers over and then selects the 1st of March in the departure date calendar modal.

description: User selects March 22nd as the return date in the calendar
frame_description: The user moves the cursor to and selects the 22nd of March as the return date.

description: User clicks the 'Done' button to confirm date selection
frame_description: The user clicks the 'Done' button at the bottom of the calendar modal to finalize their date choices.
After the calendar modal closes, the user clicks the primary 'Search Flights' button on the main search form.

description: Page navigates to the flight search results page
frame_description: The browser navigates to the search results subdomain.

description: Loading animation (plane flying between cities) is displayed while searching for flights
frame_description: A loading screen appears with an animated plane flying between Brisbane and London while flight options are being retrieved.
